languages.text: {n}Страсти бушуют внутри вас, и их сила растет от невозможности найти выход наружу — в крике, движении, даже гримасе. Вам остается только надеяться, что ваша способность испытывать эмоции выбьется из сил быстрее, чем вы потеряете сознание от перенапряжения.{/n}

{n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Страсти бушуют внутри вас, и их сила растет от невозможности найти выход наружу — в крике, движении, даже гримасе. Вам остается только надеяться, что ваша способность испытывать эмоции выбьется из сил быстрее, чем вы потеряете сознание от перенапряжения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

{n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

{n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

languages.text: {n}感情が暴れ、発散の場を見つけることができない。叫び、動き、表情さえも。ただ、意識を失う前に感情が枯渇することを願うのみである。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}感情が暴れ、発散の場を見つけることができない。叫び、動き、表情さえも。ただ、意識を失う前に感情が枯渇することを願うのみである。{/n}

languages.text: {n}翻涌的情绪在你心中愈演愈烈，却找不到任何出口——你喊不出声，动不了身体，就连一丝表情都做不出来。在这股重压之下，你唯一能期盼的，就是自己的感知能力可以在昏厥之前先一步耗尽。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}翻涌的情绪在你心中愈演愈烈，却找不到任何出口——你喊不出声，动不了身体，就连一丝表情都做不出来。在这股重压之下，你唯一能期盼的，就是自己的感知能力可以在昏厥之前先一步耗尽。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus emociones se revuelven en tu interior, aumentando de fuerza al no encontrar alivio: ni un grito, ni un movimiento, ni siquiera un gesto. Solo puedes confiar en que tu capacidad emocional se agote antes de que pierdas la consciencia por el esfuerzo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus emociones se revuelven en tu interior, aumentando de fuerza al no encontrar alivio: ni un grito, ni un movimiento, ni siquiera un gesto. Solo puedes confiar en que tu capacidad emocional se agote antes de que pierdas la consciencia por el esfuerzo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}In dir herrscht ein Chaos von Gefühlen, die an Stärke gewinnen, als sie kein Ventil finden ... sei es ein Schrei, eine Bewegung oder eine Grimasse. Du kannst nur hoffen, dass deine Fähigkeit, etwas zu fühlen, erschöpft ist, ehe du das Bewusstsein verlierst.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In dir herrscht ein Chaos von Gefühlen, die an Stärke gewinnen, als sie kein Ventil finden ... sei es ein Schrei, eine Bewegung oder eine Grimasse. Du kannst nur hoffen, dass deine Fähigkeit, etwas zu fühlen, erschöpft ist, ehe du das Bewusstsein verlierst.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vos émotions se déchaînent en vous et ne font que gagner en intensité, incapables de trouver un exutoire puisqu'il vous est impossible de crier, de bouger ou même de grimacer. Vous pouvez seulement espérer que l'épuisement finira par vous insensibiliser avant que l'effort ne vous fasse perdre connaissance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos émotions se déchaînent en vous et ne font que gagner en intensité, incapables de trouver un exutoire puisqu'il vous est impossible de crier, de bouger ou même de grimacer. Vous pouvez seulement espérer que l'épuisement finira par vous insensibiliser avant que l'effort ne vous fasse perdre connaissance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Duyguların içinde isyan ediyor. Çıkış yolu bulamadıkça çığlıkların, hareketlenmelerin, hatta yüzünü en ufak buruşturuşun bile isyanı kuvvetlendiriyor. Tek umudun, gerginlikten bilincini kaybetmeden önce hissetme yeteneğini kaybetmen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your emotions riot within you, only growing in strength as they fail to find an outlet — in a shout, a movement, even a grimace. All you can hope is that your ability to feel will be exhausted before you lose consciousness from the strain.{/n}
